abilities.name: Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: Strength from the Elements
abilities.text: Once per turn. This model must have activated this turn. After an enemy model ends its activation, if all enemy model have activated this turn, this model may kill a friendly elemental model within 6". If it does, this model gains a Slow token and may activate a second time this turn.

actions.name: Paired Knives
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Revelation
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Elemental Creation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Summon a gamin Academic model within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Gamin Storm
triggers.text: Summon one additional gamin Academic model within 2" of the target for each raise this action receives.

actions.name: Bladed Maelstrom
actions.effects: If the target is engaged with an elemental ally, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Formless Servant
triggers.text: After killing, summon a gamin Academic model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".
